rationale: Educ. Code §28.001 governs curriculum standards set by the State Board of Education. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: It is the intent of the legislature that the essential knowledge and skills developed by the State Board of Education under this subchapter shall require all students to demonstrate the knowledge and skills necessary to read, write, compute, problem solve, think critically, apply technology, and communicate across all subject areas.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict identified.
